description_long: This sculpture depicts a bust of a human figure, likely female, adorned with an elaborate headdress featuring a bird perched at the top and radiating, leaf-like extensions. The facial features are delicately modeled, with a serene expression and detailed hair. The bust is truncated at the shoulders and chest, with some ornamental elements draped across the torso. The surface has a weathered, greenish patina, suggesting it is made of aged bronze or copper alloy. The back of the headdress is broad and flat, with visible roughness and some irregularities. The overall form is compact, with the headdress providing the widest dimension.
description: A weathered bronze bust of a female figure with an ornate, bird-topped headdress and detailed facial features. The sculpture has a greenish patina and a broad, leaf-like crown.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the detailed face, chest, and the full ornate headdress with a bird at the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the face and the depth of the headdress, with the bust's contours visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat, broad back of the headdress and the less detailed back of the bust.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile and the layered structure of the headdress.
attribute_subject_matter: female bust with ornate headdress and bird
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate installation environment.
